features: Rebuilt Dispatch/Admin Clients page using the generated command-center blueprint
Added KPI row for total clients, active clients, active contracts, monthly revenue, expiring contracts, and past due clients
Added tabs: All Clients, Active, Inactive, Prospects, On Hold
Added filters for status, client type, service type, region, and sorting
Added client roster table with logo/avatar, type, contact, sites, contract, status, revenue, and actions
Added selected client right rail with profile, tabs, contact info, revenue, services, site/request/report stats, and profile/edit actions
Added search, pagination, rows-per-page, clear filters, add client placeholder, columns placeholder, and export placeholder
Preserved global sidebar fix from v3.0.57
